title: dolia tomentosa
intro: Dolia tomentosa, also known as Dolichos tomentosus, is a plant species belonging to the legume family, native to tropical Africa and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Dolia tomentosa include its ability to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its use as a treatment for wounds and snake bites. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and poultices, which are made by steeping the leaves and roots in hot water or oil to extract its active compounds.
